message: Node started: Task: Optimize stamp placement on a grid to maximize the sum of cell values. Input: N (grid dimension, 9x9), M (number of available stamps, 20), K (max placements, 81). Initial N x N grid of integers. M stamps, each a 3x3 grid of integers. State Space: A 9x9 grid of integers. Initial state is the input grid. Transition Rules: Operation: Select stamp index m (0 to M-1) and top-left coordinate (i, j) such that 0 <= i <= N-3 and 0 <= j <= N-3. Effect: For all 0 <= di, dj < 3, grid[i+di][j+dj] = (grid[i+di][j+dj] + stamp[m][di][dj]) mod 998244353. Constraint: Total operations L <= K. Objective Function: Maximize Sum(grid[i][j]) for all 0 <= i, j < N. Note: The sum is calculated after all modulo operations are applied to individual cells. Output Format: Line 1: L (number of placements, 0 <= L <= K). Next L lines: m i j (stamp index, top-left row, top-left column). Constraints: Grid size: 9x9. Stamp size: 3x3. Modulo: 998244353. Max placements: 81. All stamp placements must be fully contained within the 9x9 grid boundaries.
